name: Ragna Crimson
description: Ragna teams up with the enigmatic Crimson to stand against the dragons menacing the world. Although Crimson’s motivations are mysterious, his goal and Ragna’s perfectly align, and together they’ll vanquish the dragons once and for all.

name: The Crimson Rivers
description: Old-school police detective Pierre Niemans and his former student Camille Delaunay tackle complex, brutal murder cases.
